reviews.review_description: I just downloaded this game and I absolutely love it! It's nice to just be able to sit and relax and put together a very cool puzzle. But if you're inclined, it also features timed puzzles. I love the style/pictures of the puzzles. I was a little confused at first looking for the edge/corner pieces, but they are not straight edged. It wasn't that hard and I became accustomed rather quickly. This is definitely a good purchase!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you enjoyed the puzzles!

reviews.review_description: Such a nice calm game top tier

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, glad you enjoyed the game!
